metadata.scope: scoring-layer validation with controlled masks and detections
metadata.note: This report evaluates formula behaviour. It does not measure BiSeNet/YOLO recognition accuracy or real fall probability.

series.name: obstacle_toward_corridor_center
series.description: The same YOLO box moves from outside the passage toward its centre.

series.name: obstacle_area
series.description: One centred obstacle grows while all other evidence is fixed.

series.name: obstacle_count
series.description: The number of non-overlapping corridor obstacles increases.

series.name: passage_narrowing
series.description: The visible walkable passage becomes narrower.

series.name: slippery_area
series.description: The slippery mask area inside the passage increases.

series.name: step_area
series.description: The step or threshold mask area increases.

series.name: darkness
series.description: Uniform image brightness decreases from 220 to 20.

series.name: liquid_detection_confidence
series.description: The confidence of a fixed liquid-spot detection increases.

acceptance.note: Internal engineering thresholds, not clinical validation.
